Container.Name: animus-engine
Container.Overview: Animus Engine is an autonomous AI assistant with persistent inner life, continuous agency, and a heartbeat-driven architecture. Unlike traditional assistants that exist only during interaction, Animus maintains continuous internal processes: thoughts, memories, emotions, and goals pursued across time. Self-hosted and single-user, each instance is your own.
Container.Requires: An Anthropic or OpenAI account (subscription or API key) is required.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Animus web interface and API.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for databases, logs, models, and configuration. Contains SQLite databases, LanceDB vectors, Hugging Face model cache, and log files.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity. Options: debug, info, warn, error.
